offer: For property managers handling 5–15 rental units/month, inefficient reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate reporting and maintenance scheduling instead of manual tracking and spreadsheets.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try simple reporting dashboard and maintenance request tracking on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
